mod_description: Send your female bot out to an underground fight club. You can win money but there's no guarantee your bot will win.

missions.title: UFC Female D
missions.description: Enter {mark}[bot]{/} in a D level fight at the {mark}'Fuck Em Up' underground fight club{/}. If the bot or any of [bot.hisher] parts exceed D rating you may be caught cheating.
missions.launch_text:
You tell {mark}[bot]{/} you are sending [bot.himher] to the {mark}'Fuck Em Up'{/} underground fight club to fight in a {mark}D{/} level fight.

You go on the club's grey net site to pay the {mark}$200 entry fee{/} to register [bot.himher] for the fight.
